problem.description: This word is normally spelled as one.
This word is normally spelled as one.
Did you mean 'keywords'?
A determiner may be missing.
Use a comma before 'and' if it connects two independent clauses (unless they are closely connected and short).
A determiner may be missing.
For abbreviations such as 'artificial intelligence', use all capital letters. The rare word 'ai' is a synonym for 'three-toed sloth'.

A determiner may be missing.
The verb 'set up' is spelled as two words. The noun 'setup' is spelled as one.

The preposition 'to' may be missing (allow someone to do something).

File types are usually capitalized
The verb after "to" should be in the base form as part of the to-infinitive. A verb can take many forms, but the base form is always used in the to-infinitive.
A comma may be missing after the conjunctive/linking adverb 'Therefore'.
Use a comma before 'and' if it connects two independent clauses (unless they are closely connected and short).
Is a comma missing, or did you mean to write "now"?

Make sure that the adjective 'existing' is correct. Possibly, it should be an adverb (typically ~ly) that modifies 'shared'. Possibly, it should be the first word in a compound adjective (hyphenated adjective). Possibly, it is correct.
A comma may be missing after the conjunctive/linking adverb 'Therefore'.
You should probably use 'are' or 'were'.
